about.title: What is e-Balami?
about.description: e-Balami is your trusted medical travel companion. We provide integrated healthcare logistics—from hospital bookings to flights and hotels—ensuring transparent service and protecting you from exploitation and fraud. The name "e-Balami" means "Book for me."
about.missionDescription: Our mission is to build the bridge of trust connecting our community with high-quality healthcare services, ensuring transparency, safety, and comprehensive support.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We are ready to help you. Please contact us by tapping the numbers and addresses below.
